website.summary: Morningside AI helps companies identify, build, deploy, and integrate custom AI solutions to transform their business. They focus on finding AI opportunities that deliver tangible results, rather than just experimenting with tools. Their process involves three key steps: 1. Identify: Understanding a company's workflows to pinpoint critical inefficiencies and the most impactful AI opportunities. 2. Develop: Building solutions that seamlessly integrate into existing systems. 3. Adopt: Training teams and fine-tuning the AI systems to ensure they become an integral part of daily operations. Morningside AI differentiates itself by being 'workflow specialists first, AI specialists second,' tool-agnostic, and results-obsessed. They aim to help companies avoid common pitfalls like unused AI tools or failed pilot projects by focusing on practical, adoptable solutions. They work with companies of various sizes, from startups to established enterprises, and have a track record of successful client engagements across multiple industries.
